title: TonearmDesigner TD051B Titanium Interface Plate Sparse Runtime Sculpt Contract
description: Normative TD051B strict JSON contract for AI Modal Response / Apply AI Vibe 3D response. TD051 keeps TD049/TD050 sparse Cobra continuity rules and adds the titaniumMountPlate contract: titanium plate is a structural laminated interface plate between carbon armwand/integrated headshell and cartridge mounting surface, not a loose underside plate and not headshellSlots.plate. External AI responses are sparse shape patches only; protected alignment/cart/physics/mass/export/global state and full-state passthrough are forbidden. TD051B repairs dangling legacy schema references: PreferredAIVibe3DResponse.delta resolves only to null, SparseShapePatchDelta or SparseEmptyDeltaWhenUninterpretable.

app.description: Current application version. Runtime does not currently reject other app strings for this wrapper, but strict AI output must use the live app version.

actions.description: Semantic action primitives. Runtime applies these before optional embedded legacy delta.

delta.description: Null or a TD051B sparse delta only. Full-state passthrough, protected fields and legacy full-session maps are forbidden.

oneOf.description: Set manufacturingMode and exportType to onshape_1to1, zero mould/plug compensation controls, set onshapeUnitScale=1, onshapeStrictOneToOne=true, onshapeMetadataSidecar=true.
Same runtime effect as set_onshape_1to1; use when neutralising legacy mould/plug parameters is the main intent.
Enable aiVibeSoftSliverPass and set aiVibeMinTriangleHardFailArea to 0.00001.
Normalizes Onshape handoff and declares protected reference datums for AI intent; runtime applies the same scale/metadata controls as normalize_onshape_handoff.
Raise existing wall/ridge/bridge support values inside a named writable zone; does not invent new geometry.

wallMin.description: Minimum wall thickness request in mm; runtime applies max(current, value).

neckWMin.description: Minimum neck width request in mm for neck zone.

ridgeHeightMin.description: Minimum canopy ridge height request in mm.

bridgeRadiusMin.description: Minimum rear support bridge radius request in mm for rear zone.

tailDMin.description: Minimum tail diameter request in mm for rear zone.

oneOf.description: Enable rear disc-stack export and enforce at least one rounded rearWeightDiscCount.
Increase rear-terminal support bridge continuity toward counterweight stack.
Normalize manufacturingMode/exportType to onshape_1to1, unit scale 1, strict 1:1 and metadata sidecar.
Set cobraArchitectureEnabled and enableCobraArchitecture true and synchronize state.cobraArchitecture.enabled.
Lock effective length/N1-P2 target by writing the apex control. Runtime fallback is 237.05 mm.

targetMm.description: N1-P2/effective target in mm; runtime writes apex to this value.

oneOf.description: Force the headshell lower surface onto a real planar local-Z underside over a specified X range, with optional TD049 front stiffness-ramp parameters.
Suppress a visible/local side-profile step by extending the flat-to-neck blend and enabling TD049 front stiffness-ramp defaults.
Generic surface-sculpt operation. Runtime currently accepts only headshell_underside as the zone/surface target.
Enable front section-height ramp controls so the headshell-to-puckel span cannot remain a blade-like thin beam. This writes only existing numeric UI controls.

SparseShapeInputMap.description: TD051 sparse sculpt input map. Omitted fields are unchanged. Protected alignment/cart/physics/export/global state is not externally writable.

padOffset.description: Pad Offset (Z-axis). Vertical Z offset for the headshell pad relative to the base reference. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

noseL.description: Nose Rounding. Front/nose rounding length between stylus/cartridge region and headshell/body transition. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

headW.description: Pad Max Width. Maximum width of the headshell pad area. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

padL.description: Pad Total Length. Total X length of the headshell pad. Existing state constraints keep this at least as long as nose rounding. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

headH.description: Nose Height (Base). Base/front height parameter for the nose section. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptHeadFlatEnabled.description: AI sculpt planar headshell underside enable flag. 0=disabled, 1=force a true lower plane over the configured headshell X zone. Numeric 0/1 keeps legacy full-passthrough deltas numeric. Unit: 0/1. Category: front_geometry.

sculptHeadFlatStartX.description: X start of the forced planar headshell underside zone. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptHeadFlatEndX.description: X end of the forced planar headshell underside zone before the smooth transition into the neck begins. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptHeadBottomZ.description: Local Z coordinate of the forced lower headshell plane before body datum is added. For a 6 mm headshell, -3 mm gives a centered lower plane. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptHeadBlendLength.description: C2-style blend length from the flat headshell underside zone into the natural neck/armwand profile. Use this to remove visible steps and local stiffness discontinuities. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptHeadFlatWidthFraction.description: Fraction of section half-width forced into a real flat lower chord. 0 keeps a rounded underside; 0.65-0.80 creates a practical flat surface without sharp layup traps. Unit: ratio. Category: front_geometry.

sculptStepSuppressor.description: Strength of AI sculpt transition smoothing. Use 1 to suppress visible side-profile steps that can become stiffness discontinuities. Unit: ratio. Category: front_geometry.

sculptFrontStiffnessRampEnabled.description: Enable deterministic front section-height ramping. 0 off, 1 on. Use to prevent ribbon-thin front/neck spans. Unit: 0/1. Category: front_geometry.

sculptFrontMinHeight.description: Minimum section height at the headshell/front of the stiffness ramp. Recommended 5.8 to 6.5 mm for the current Cobra form. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptFrontRampStartX.description: X start of the front stiffness ramp. Normally 0 mm at stylus/front datum. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptFrontRampEndX.description: X end of the front stiffness ramp before normal monocoque expansion dominates. Recommended 70 to 90 mm for the current headshell-to-puckel transition. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptFrontRampTargetHeight.description: Minimum section height reached at sculptFrontRampEndX. Recommended 9.5 to 11 mm. Unit: mm. Category: front_geometry.

sculptFrontTopBias.description: Distribution of added ramp height. 1 grows upward from flat underside; 0.5 splits around existing profile. Unit: ratio. Category: front_geometry.

neckW.description: Neck Width (Waist). Narrow waist width for the neck transition from headshell to main body. Unit: mm. Category: body_geometry.

neckL.description: Neck Length. Length of the neck transition before the main body expands. Unit: mm. Category: body_geometry.

asym.description: Asymmetry Belly/Crown. Dimensionless control balancing belly/crown asymmetry in the existing beam shape. Unit: ratio. Category: body_geometry.

maxH.description: Max Height (Side). Maximum side-profile height of the main body. Unit: mm. Category: body_geometry.

maxW.description: Max Width (Top). Maximum top-view width of the main body. Unit: mm. Category: body_geometry.

bow.description: Vertical Arch (Lift). Vertical arch/lift control for the existing body profile. Unit: mm. Category: body_geometry.

thick.description: Wall Thickness. Wall thickness used by the existing shell/export and structural approximations. Unit: mm. Category: material_structure.

canopyRidgeHeight.description: Canopy Ridge Height. AI-visible upper ridge control for Cobra-like monocoque stiffness grammar. Unit: mm. Category: body_geometry.

canopyRidgeWidthFraction.description: Canopy Ridge Width Fraction. Fractional width of the station-based canopy ridge. Unit: dimensionless. Category: body_geometry.

canopyRidgeSharpness.description: Canopy Ridge Sharpness. Sharpness exponent for station-based canopy ridge shaping. Unit: dimensionless. Category: body_geometry.

rearBlendLength.description: Blend Zone Length. Length over which the classic body blends toward the rear/tail section. Unit: mm. Category: rear_geometry.

rearBendStartX.description: Bend Start X. Start X location for the existing Cobra/Hollow Elbow rear transition control; this is armwand-to-pivot transition, not heart-counterweight geometry. Notes: Existing TD012 rear geometry only; no Engrove LT geometry is introduced. Unit: mm. Category: rear_geometry.

rearBendDropZ.description: Bend Drop Z. Vertical drop magnitude for the existing rear bend. Unit: mm. Category: rear_geometry.

rearBendLength.description: Bend Radius/Length. Length/radius-like control for the existing rear bend transition. Unit: mm. Category: rear_geometry.

rearMouthWidth.description: Mouth Outer Width (Y). Outer Y width of the existing rear mouth/transition geometry; in Cobra mode this is protected core geometry, not a disc-stack counterweight proxy. Unit: mm. Category: rear_geometry.

rearMouthLength.description: Mouth Outer Length (X). Outer X length of the rear mouth in the existing rear accessory geometry. Unit: mm. Category: rear_geometry.

bulge.description: Rear Radius (Bluntness). Dimensionless bluntness/radius shaping control for the classic tail end. Unit: ratio. Category: rear_geometry.

tailD.description: End Diameter. End diameter of the existing tail section. Notes: This is not a full-length or envelope-length control. Unit: mm. Category: rear_geometry.

rearWeightDiscDiameter.description: Disc Diameter. Diameter of each canonical rear-terminal Cobra disc-stack counterweight plate. Unit: mm. Category: counterweight.

rearWeightDiscThickness.description: Disc Thickness. Axial thickness of each rear counterweight disc. Unit: mm. Category: counterweight.

rearWeightDiscCount.description: Disc Count. Integer number of existing rear disc accessories/proxies included in the model/analysis. In Cobra target mode, rear disc stack is not the canonical counterweight. Unit: pcs. Category: counterweight.

rearWeightDiscMass.description: Disc Mass. Mass of each rear counterweight disc. Unit: g/ea. Category: counterweight.

rearFineTrimScrewLength.description: Fine Trim Length. Length of the existing rear fine-trim screw visual/physics proxy; Cobra reference has an 8 gram fine stylus-load trim screw at the rear. Unit: mm. Category: counterweight.

rearFineTrimScrewMassEquivalent.description: Fine Trim Equivalent Mass. Non-negative equivalent mass for the rear fine-trim screw. Z balance is adjusted with counterweightZOffset, not negative mass. Notes: Negative mass is prohibited; use counterweightZOffset for vertical balance tuning. Unit: g. Category: counterweight.

counterweightZOffset.description: Counterweight Z Offset. Vertical position offset for the physical counterweight stack. This replaces negative-mass balancing hacks. Notes: Physical masses remain non-negative; move the counterweight stack vertically to tune COM Z. Unit: mm. Category: counterweight.

rearSupportBridgeLength.description: Support Bridge Length. Explicit rear-terminal to disc-stack support bridge length for non-tangent printable counterweight connection. Unit: mm. Category: counterweight.

rearSupportBridgeRadius.description: Support Bridge Radius. Radius of the printable support bridge between rear terminal and disc stack. Unit: mm. Category: counterweight.

rearSupportBridgeOverlap.description: Support Bridge Overlap. Boolean-safe overlap at both support bridge ends to avoid tangent-only contact. Unit: mm. Category: counterweight.

titaniumPlateLength.description: TD051 writable: structural titanium interface plate length in the headshell-to-neck laminated interface zone; not headshellSlots.plate.

titaniumPlateWidth.description: TD051 writable: structural titanium interface plate width; not slot-carrier/reference geometry.

titaniumPlateThickness.description: TD051 writable: structural titanium interface plate thickness.

titaniumPlateMass.description: TD051 writable: structural titanium interface plate mass, separate from cartridge mass.

titaniumPlateX.description: TD051B writable: actual titaniumMountPlate X center consumed by TitaniumMountPlate.resolveTitaniumMountPlatePose and clamped to the headshell-to-neck interface zone; expected interface default around x=32 mm, not the x≈10.2 slot/cartridge underside zone.

titaniumPlateYOffset.description: TD051 writable: actual titaniumMountPlate lateral Y offset consumed by TitaniumMountPlate.resolveTitaniumMountPlatePose.

titaniumPlateZOffset.description: TD051 writable: actual titaniumMountPlate vertical interface offset consumed by TitaniumMountPlate.resolveTitaniumMountPlatePose; not a loose underside-plate control.

titaniumAdhesiveThickness.description: TD051 writable: adhesive layer in the carbon-to-titanium laminated interface.

titaniumAdhesiveDampingLossFactor.description: TD051 writable: damping-loss estimate for the interface adhesive layer.

SparseEmptyObjectMap.description: External TD051 sparse shape patches must not write selects, checkboxes or flags unless a future schema-specific semantic action explicitly allows a field.

name.description: Sparse patch names must be meaningful and must not use full-state/legacy/no-op names.

SparseShapePatchDelta.description: TD051 external AI sparse shape patch. This replaces the TD048/legacy full-state passthrough pattern. Do not return full session inputs/selects/checkboxes/flags.

SparseEmptyDeltaWhenUninterpretable.description: Explicit no-op sparse delta for uninterpretable user intent.

SparseArchitectureGateOkEnvelope.description: Sparse architecture-gate envelope. Delta remains sparse; no full-state passthrough is allowed.

SparseUnsupportedAttributes.description: Names missing requested geometric/mechanical attributes. Sparse unsupported attribute list. This does not excuse an empty delta except genuine no_interpretable_request.

$comment: TD051 primary contract. External AI emits sparse deltas only. Runtime ignores protected fields, enforces Cobra invariants, separates headshellSlots slot-carrier geometry from titaniumMountPlate and forbids false-writable titanium controls. TD051B: no dangling LegacyFullPassthroughDelta or LegacyEmptyDeltaWhenUninterpretable refs are permitted.
